page.title: Wildcard Management
page.noWildcardsDesc: Add new wildcards to automate prompt generation

actions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the '{{name}}' wildcard?

form.name: Name
form.parentHelper: Select a parent wildcard to create a hierarchy
form.includeChildrenHelper: When enabled, using this wildcard will automatically include items from direct children
form.itemsHelper: Each item can contain comma-separated words. You can nest other wildcards using ++name++ format.
form.itemPlaceholder: e.g. rose, red, thorns or wilted, ++flower++

preview.title: Wildcard Preview
preview.inputPlaceholder: e.g. A garden with blooming ++flower++, ++color++ sky

errors.itemsRequired: At least one item is required
errors.previewTextRequired: Please enter a prompt to test

detail.selectItem: Select an item from the left

autoCollect.title: LORA Wildcard Auto-Generation
autoCollect.description: Scan LORA folders to automatically generate wildcards
autoCollect.folderPathHelper: Specify ComfyUI loras folder or subfolder containing LORA files
autoCollect.loraWeightHelper: Default weight value for generated wildcards (e.g., 1.0)
autoCollect.commonTextFilenameHelper: Common text filename to use within folders (e.g., add.txt, common.txt)
autoCollect.priorityFilename: Filename Matching First (fallback to common text)
autoCollect.priorityCommon: Common Text First (fallback to filename matching)
autoCollect.noScanYet: No scan has been performed yet

filters.tryDifferentFilters: Try different search terms or filters

autoCollect.noAutoWildcardsDesc: Scan a LORA folder to generate wildcards

errors.invalidWeight: Please enter a valid weight value (0.1 ~ 2.0)

scanDialog.title: LORA Wildcard Auto-Generation
scanDialog.infoMessage: Please select ComfyUI's loras folder or a folder containing LORA files.
scanDialog.warning2: Re-scanning the same folder will update the items
scanDialog.warning3: Auto-collected items can be found in this tab

detailDialog.title: View List (Read-Only)
detailDialog.readOnlyInfo: Auto-collected items cannot be edited. You can only view the contents.
detailDialog.name: List Name

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Wildcard Deletion
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete '{{name}}' wildcard?

moveUp.label: Delete this item only
moveUp.description: Child wildcards will move one level up

cascade.label: Delete with children
cascade.description: {{count}} child wildcard(s) will also be deleted
